posts.author: I_have_lady_parts-2
posts.title: R.E.S.P.E.C.T

posts.raw_content:
Muslim Brotherhood  
 └ Palestine Committee of the Muslim Brotherhood - create organizations "whose job is to make the Palestinian cause victorious and to support it with what it needs of media, money, men and all of that."  
    ├ Holy Land Foundation - money - founded by Palestine Committee members Mohammad El-Mezain, Ghassan Elashi, Shukri Abu Baker  
    ├ United Associated for Studies and Research (USAR) - think tank, books, pamphlets, etc  
    └ Islamic Association of Palestine (IAP) - media  
       └ Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR) - founded by IAP officers Nihad Awad and Omar Ahmad.  

---

The Muslim Brotherhood created CAIR, ISNA, ICNA (Council on American-Islamic Relations, Islamic Society of North America, Islamic Circle of North America) to "destroy the Western civilization from within". [A]  
  
CAIR is a group established by the Muslim Brotherhood [B-G]  
  
[A] Muslim Brotherhood's strategic goals for North America, 1991 meeting United States v. Holy Land Foundation for Relief and Development et al., 3:04-cr-00240 (2007 N.D. Tex.), Government Exhibit "Elbarasse Search 3" accessed at https://web.archive.org/web/20161208042910/http://coop.txnd.uscourts.gov/judges/hlf2/09-25-08/Elbarasse%20Search%203.pdf  
  
[B] Palestine Committee - whose job is to make the Palestinian cause victorious and to support it with what it needs of media, money, men and all of that. United States v. Holy Land Foundation for Relief and Development et al., 3:04-cr-00240 (2007 N.D. Tex.), Government Exhibit "Elbarasse Search 5" accessed at https://web.archive.org/web/20161208042910/http://coop.txnd.uscourts.gov/judges/hlf2/09-25-08/Elbarasse%20Search%205.pdf  
  
[C] July 30, 1994 "Meeting Agenda for the Palestine Committee" lists UASR, HLF, IAP and CAIR as organizations of the Palestine Committee United States v. Holy Land Foundation for Relief and Development et al., 3:04-cr-00240 (2007 N.D. Tex.), Government Exhibit "Elbarasse Search 19" accessed at https://web.archive.org/web/20161208042910/http://coop.txnd.uscourts.gov/judges/hlf2/09-29-08/Elbarasse%20Search%2019.pdf  
  
[D] Bylaws of the Palestine Committee of the Muslim Brotherhood, "The Palestine Committee is a specialized committee emanating from the Palestine Section which was formed by the executive office of the Muslim Brotherhood in the Levant countries. Its scope of work is limited to North America and its contacts include other countries." accessed at http://www.investigativeproject.org/documents/24-bylaws-of-the-palestine-committee-of-the-muslim.pdf  
  
[E] United States v. Holy Land Foundation for Relief and Development et al., 3:04-cr-00240 (2007 N.D. Tex.), Government Exhibit "Philadelphia Meeting 10/2-3/1993" accessed at https://web.archive.org/web/20161208042910/http://coop.txnd.uscourts.gov/judges/hlf2/09-29-08/Philly%20Meeting%20Summary.pdf  
  
[F] Omar Ahmad airline tickets to the Philadelphia Meeting 10/2-3/1993 paid by for Haitham Maghawri of Holy Land Foundation United States v. Holy Land Foundation for Relief and Development et al., 3:04-cr-00240 (2007 N.D. Tex.), Government Exhibit "AMEX 1" see "Item 13" on page 12 accessed at https://web.archive.org/web/20161208042910/http://coop.txnd.uscourts.gov/judges/hlf2/09-29-08/AMEX%201.pdf  
  
[G] United States v. Mohammad El-Mezain, 09-10560 (5th Cir. 2012), accessed at http://www.ca5.uscourts.gov/opinions/pub/09/09-10560-CR0.wpd.pdf
